introSection: Coccinelle is a steel roller coaster located at Walibi Rhône-Alpes in Les Avenières, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Coccinelle is French for Ladybird.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Coccinelle is a Zierer Tivoli Large model. This model has a double figure eight layout, which is two figure eights with a circle around them.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Red track and green supports. The ride opened with yellow track and red supports.

fullText:
Coccinelle is a steel roller coaster located at Walibi Rhône-Alpes in Les Avenières, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Coccinelle is French for Ladybird.

Coccinelle is a Zierer Tivoli Large model. This model has a double figure eight layout, which is two figure eights with a circle around them.

Red track and green supports. The ride opened with yellow track and red supports.
